chunks.title: Introduction to the Oracle on Egypt
chunks.reason: Sets the context and historical background for the prophecy.

chunks.title: The Battle at Carchemish
chunks.reason: Describes the defeat of Egypt's army by Babylon.

chunks.title: The Coming Invasion of Egypt
chunks.reason: Details Nebuchadnezzar's future conquest and the judgment on Egyptian gods.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration for Israel
chunks.reason: Shifts focus to God's promise of deliverance for Jacob.
